languages.text: "Рекомендую поберечь время и приступить к выполнению Протокола 17.0".
"Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."
languages.original_text: "Рекомендую поберечь время и приступить к выполнению Протокола 17.0".

traits.locale_text: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."
"Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."
"Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."

languages.text: 「時間節約のため、17.0条の執行を続行することを勧告する」
languages.original_text: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."

traits.locale_text: 「時間節約のため、17.0条の執行を続行することを勧告する」

languages.text: «Recomiendo que ahorremos tiempo y procedamos a ejecutar el protocolo 17.0».
languages.original_text: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."

traits.locale_text: «Recomiendo que ahorremos tiempo y procedamos a ejecutar el protocolo 17.0».

languages.text: “建议节省时间，继续执行17.0协议。”
languages.original_text: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."

traits.locale_text: “建议节省时间，继续执行17.0协议。”

languages.text: "Ich schlage vor, wir sparen Zeit und fahren mit Protokoll 17.0 fort."
languages.original_text: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."

traits.locale_text: "Ich schlage vor, wir sparen Zeit und fahren mit Protokoll 17.0 fort."

languages.text: "Zaman kazanmamızı ve Protokol 17.0'ın uygulanmasına geçmemizi tavsiye ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."

traits.locale_text: "Zaman kazanmamızı ve Protokol 17.0'ın uygulanmasına geçmemizi tavsiye ediyorum."

languages.text: « Je vous propose de gagner du temps et d'exécuter sans tarder le protocole 17.0. »
languages.original_text: "Advising that we save time and proceed with the execution of Protocol 17.0."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous propose de gagner du temps et d'exécuter sans tarder le protocole 17.0. »
